column1: # location_descriptions.tsv -- LAYER 1 (highest priority) of the desc_sources waterfall.
# Hand-authored English descriptions, keyed by the check's event flag. Anything here WINS over the
# boss / spot-name / nearest-grace / locale layers, so this is where you correct any auto-descriptor
# that reads badly, and where you give the "self-explanatory" special cases a chosen phrase.
# Format:  <flag>\t<English description>    (tab-separated; '#' lines and blanks ignored)
# The description is inserted as:  Region :: Item - <description> [f<flag>]
